api_key.label: API Key
api_key.description: You can find this by going to Klaviyo's UI and clicking Account > Settings > API Keys > Create API Key

listId.label: List Id
listId.description: The default List ID to subscribe users to. This list takes precedence over the new list segment auto creates when attaching this destination to an audience.

retlOnMappingSave.label: Connect to a static list in Klaviyo
retlOnMappingSave.description: When saving this mapping, we will connect to a list in Klaviyo.

list_identifier.label: Existing List ID
list_identifier.description: The ID of the list in Klaviyo that users will be synced to. If defined, we will not create a new list.

list_name.label: Name of list to create
list_name.description: The name of the list that you would like to create in Klaviyo.

id.label: ID
id.description: The ID of the created Klaviyo list that users will be synced to.

name.label: List Name
name.description: The name of the created Klaviyo list that users will be synced to.

email.label: Email
email.description: Individual's email address. One of External ID, Phone Number and Email required.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Klaviyo
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the klaviyo batch API.

phone_number.label: Phone Number
phone_number.description: Individual's phone number in E.164 format. If SMS is not enabled and if you use Phone Number as identifier, then you have to provide one of Email or External ID.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: Country Code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format. If provided, this will be used to validate and automatically format Phone Number field in E.164 format accepted by Klaviyo.

choices.label: BQ - Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba
CD - Congo, Democratic Republic of the
GB - United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
HM - Heard Island and McDonald Islands
UM - United States Minor Outlying Islands
VC - Saint Vincent and the Grenadines

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: A unique identifier used by customers to associate Klaviyo profiles with profiles in an external system. One of External ID, Phone Number and Email required.

organization.label: Organization
organization.description: Name of the company or organization within the company for whom the individual works.

image.label: Image
image.description: URL pointing to the location of a profile image.

properties.label: Properties
properties.description: An object containing key/value pairs for any custom properties assigned to this profile.

list_id.label: List
list_id.description: The Klaviyo list to add the profile to.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

override_list_id.label: List ID Override
override_list_id.description: Klaviyo list ID to override the default list ID when provided in an event payload. Added to support backward compatibility with klaviyo(classic) and facilitate a seamless migration.

batch_keys.label: Batch Keys
batch_keys.description: The keys to use for batching the events.

email.label: Email
email.description: The user's email to send to Klavio.

phone_number.label: Phone Number
phone_number.description: Individual's phone number in E.164 format. If SMS is not enabled and if you use Phone Number as identifier, then you have to provide one of Email or External ID.

list_id.label: List Id
list_id.description: 'Insert the ID of the default list that you'd like to subscribe users to when you call .identify().'

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: A unique identifier used by customers to associate Klaviyo profiles with profiles in an external system. One of External ID, Email or Phone Number is required. Must not exceed 255 characters.

enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the klaviyo batch API.

trackEvent.title: Track Event
trackEvent.description: Track user events and associate it with their profile.

profile.label: Profile
profile.description: Properties of the profile that triggered this event.

email.label: Email
email.description: The user's email to send to Klavio.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: Country Code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format. If provided, this will be used to validate and automatically format Phone Number field in E.164 format accepted by Klaviyo.

choices.label: BQ - Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba
CD - Congo, Democratic Republic of the
GB - United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
HM - Heard Island and McDonald Islands
UM - United States Minor Outlying Islands
VC - Saint Vincent and the Grenadines

external_id.label: External Id
external_id.description: A unique identifier used by customers to associate Klaviyo profiles with profiles in an external system.

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous Id
anonymous_id.description: Anonymous user identifier for the user.

metric_name.label: Metric Name
metric_name.description: Name of the event. Must be less than 128 characters.

time.label: Time
time.description:
When this event occurred. By default, the time the request was received will be used.
      The time is truncated to the second. The time must be after the year 2000 and can only
      be up to 1 year in the future.

value.label: Value
value.description: A numeric value to associate with this event. For example, the dollar amount of a purchase.

unique_id.label: Unique ID
unique_id.description:
A unique identifier for an event. If the unique_id is repeated for the same
      profile and metric, only the first processed event will be recorded. If this is not
      present, this will use the time to the second. Using the default, this limits only one
      event per profile per second.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Klaviyo
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the klaviyo batch API.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

orderCompleted.title: Order Completed
orderCompleted.description: Order Completed Event action tracks users Order Completed events and associate it with their profile.

profile.label: Profile
profile.description: Properties of the profile that triggered this event.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: Country Code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format. If provided, this will be used to validate and automatically format Phone Number field in E.164 format accepted by Klaviyo.

choices.label: BQ - Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba
CD - Congo, Democratic Republic of the
GB - United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
HM - Heard Island and McDonald Islands
UM - United States Minor Outlying Islands
VC - Saint Vincent and the Grenadines

external_id.label: External Id
external_id.description: A unique identifier used by customers to associate Klaviyo profiles with profiles in an external system.

anonymous_id.label: Anonymous Id
anonymous_id.description: Anonymous user identifier for the user.

time.label: Time
time.description:
When this event occurred. By default, the time the request was received will be used.
      The time is truncated to the second. The time must be after the year 2000 and can only
      be up to 1 year in the future.

value.label: Value
value.description: A numeric value to associate with this event. For example, the dollar amount of a purchase.

unique_id.label: Unique ID
unique_id.description:
A unique identifier for an event. If the unique_id is repeated for the same
      profile and metric, only the first processed event will be recorded. If this is not
      present, this will use the time to the second. Using the default, this limits only one
      event per profile per second.

products.label: Products
products.description: List of products purchased in the order.

event_name.label: Event Name
event_name.description: Name of the event. This will be used as the metric name for order completed event sent to Klaviyo. It must be configured in Klaviyo.

product_event_name.label: Product Event Name
product_event_name.description: Name of the Product Event. This will be used as the metric name for each ordered product configured in the product list sent to Klaviyo. It must be configured in Klaviyo.

subscribeProfile.title: Subscribe Profile
subscribeProfile.description: Subscribe Klaviyo profiles to Email marketing, SMS marketing, or both.

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address to subscribe. If provided, the associated profile will be subscribed to Email marketing.

phone_number.label: Phone Number
phone_number.description: The phone number to subscribe. This must be in E.164 format. If provided, the associated profile will be subscribed to SMS marketing.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: Country Code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format. If provided, this will be used to validate and automatically format Phone Number field in E.164 format accepted by Klaviyo.

choices.label: BQ - Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba
CD - Congo, Democratic Republic of the
GB - United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
HM - Heard Island and McDonald Islands
UM - United States Minor Outlying Islands
VC - Saint Vincent and the Grenadines

list_id.label: List Id
list_id.description: The Klaviyo list to add the newly subscribed profiles to. If no List Id is present, the opt-in process used to subscribe the profile depends on the account's default opt-in settings.

custom_source.label: Custom Source ($source)
custom_source.description: A custom method or source to detail source of consent preferences (e.g., "Marketing Event"). The default is set to -59, as this is [the $source value associated with Segment](https://help.klaviyo.com/hc/en-us/articles/1260804673530#h_01HDKHG9AM4BSSM009BM6XBF1H).

historical_import.label: Historical Import
historical_import.description: When set to true, the profile will be subscribed as a historical import. This is useful for importing existing profiles into Klaviyo without sending them an email or SMS.

consented_at.label: Consented At
consented_at.description: The timestamp of when the profile's consent was gathered.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Klaviyo
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the Klaviyo batch API.

batch_keys.label: Batch Keys
batch_keys.description: The keys to use for batching the events.

batch_size.label: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.

unsubscribeProfile.title: Unsubscribe Profile
unsubscribeProfile.description: Unsubscribe Klaviyo profiles from Email marketing, SMS marketing, or both.

email.label: Email
email.description: The email address to unsubscribe. If provided, the associated profile will be unsubscribed to Email marketing.

phone_number.label: Phone Number
phone_number.description: The phone number to unsubscribe. This must be in E.164 format. If provided, the associated profile will be unsubscribed to SMS marketing.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: Country Code in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format. If provided, this will be used to validate and automatically format Phone Number field in E.164 format accepted by Klaviyo.

choices.label: BQ - Bonaire, Sint Eustatius and Saba
CD - Congo, Democratic Republic of the
GB - United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
HM - Heard Island and McDonald Islands
UM - United States Minor Outlying Islands
VC - Saint Vincent and the Grenadines

list_id.label: List Id
list_id.description: The Klaviyo list to remove the subscribed profiles from. If no list id is provided, the profile will be unsubscribed from all channels.

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Klaviyo
enable_batching.description: When enabled, the action will use the Klaviyo batch API.

batch_keys.label: Batch Keys
batch_keys.description: The keys to use for batching the events.

batch_size.description: Maximum number of events to include in each batch. Actual batch sizes may be lower.
